sections.heading: What is Panjab University Date Sheet 2025?

content.text: The Panjab University Date Sheet 2025 is the official examination schedule released by Panjab University for B.A, B.Sc and B.Ed students for the academic year 2024-25. This comprehensive document provides:

items: Subject-wise Exam Dates: Specific date for each paper/subject
Exam Timing: Start time, duration, and end time for each exam
Semester/Year-wise Schedule: Separate schedules for different semesters
Exam Shift Details: Morning/afternoon/evening shift information
Paper Codes: Subject codes for identification
Exam Mode: Theory/Practical/Viva-Voce details

content.text: Students appearing for Panjab University B.A, B.Sc and B.Ed examinations must download and thoroughly review the date sheet to avoid missing any examination.

sections.heading: Panjab University B.A, B.Sc and B.Ed Important Dates 2025

rows: Last Date for Exam Form Correction

sections.heading: How to Download Panjab University B.A, B.Sc and B.Ed Date Sheet 2025? (Complete Guide)
Method 1: Download from Official Website (Step-by-Step)

items: Open Official Website: Visit puchd.ac.in in your browser
Navigate to Examinations: Click on "Examinations" or "Students" section from the main menu
Find Date Sheet Link: Look for "Date Sheet", "Examination Schedule", or "Time Table" option
Select Academic Session: Choose "2024-25" or the current academic year
Choose Your Course: Select "B.A", "B.Sc" or "B.Ed"
Select Exam Category: Choose Regular/Supplementary/Private as applicable
Select Semester/Year: Pick your current semester (1st, 2nd, 3rd, etc.)
Download PDF: Click the "Download" or "View" button to open the date sheet
Save the File: Save the PDF on your device for future reference
Take Printout: Print a copy to keep handy during exams

sections.heading: Method 2: Quick Download (Direct Links)

content.text: Use the direct download links provided in the table above to instantly access your Panjab University B.A, B.Sc and B.Ed Date Sheet 2025 PDF without navigating the official website.

sections.heading: Important Instructions for Panjab University B.A, B.Sc and B.Ed Examinations 2025
Before Downloading Date Sheet

items: Ensure you're downloading from the official website puchd.ac.in
Check that the date sheet is for the correct academic session (2024-25)
Verify your course and semester information
Download both regular and supplementary schedules if applicable

sections.heading: After Downloading Date Sheet

items: Carefully check all exam dates and timings
Note down your exam center location and code
Mark the reporting time (usually 30 minutes before exam start)
Create a personal study timetable based on the exam schedule
Take multiple printouts and keep them safely
Set reminders for each exam date

sections.heading: Exam Day Checklist

items: Admit Card (mandatory - download from puchd.ac.in)
Valid Photo ID (Aadhar/PAN/Driving License/Passport)
College ID Card
Blue/Black ballpoint pens (at least 3-4)
Pencil, eraser, sharpener (if required)
Transparent water bottle
Date sheet printout (for reference)
Mobile phones strictly prohibited
Electronic devices not allowed
Programmable calculators banned (unless specified)

sections.heading: General Exam Guidelines

items: Reporting Time: Reach exam center at least 30 minutes before start time
Entry Restrictions: No entry allowed after exam begins
Exit Rules: Cannot leave exam hall in first 30 minutes and last 15 minutes
Answer Sheet: Fill all details carefully before starting
Rough Work: Use only provided sheets; no external papers allowed
Unfair Means: Strictly prohibited; leads to cancellation

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions - Panjab University B.A, B.Sc and B.Ed Date Sheet 2025

content.text: Q1. When will Panjab University B.A, B.Sc and B.Ed Date Sheet 2025 be released?
Answer: The Panjab University typically releases the date sheet 3-4 weeks before examinations begin. For exact dates, regularly check puchd.ac.in or bookmark this page for instant updates.
Q2. Where can I download Panjab University Date Sheet 2025?

Answer: You can download the Panjab University B.A, B.Sc and B.Ed Date Sheet 2025 from the official website puchd.ac.in under the "Examinations" section. Alternatively, use the direct download links provided on this page for instant access.
Q3. Is the date sheet same for regular and private students?

Answer: Usually, the exam dates are the same for both regular and private/external students, but there might be different reporting times or exam centers. Check the specific date sheet for your category.
Q4. What if I miss downloading the date sheet?

Answer: The date sheet remains available on the official website throughout the exam period. You can download it anytime. Additionally, your college will display it on notice boards, and you can get printouts from the examination office.
Q5. Can Panjab University change exam dates after releasing date sheet?

Answer: In exceptional circumstances (natural calamities, public holidays, unforeseen events), exam dates may be revised. If this happens, a revised date sheet will be published with clear notifications. Always check the official website for updates.
Q6. Is admit card mandatory along with date sheet?

Answer: Yes, admit card is absolutely mandatory for appearing in exams. The date sheet only tells you when and what exams are scheduled. You must download your admit card separately from puchd.ac.in before each exam.
Q7. What is the exam timing for Panjab University B.A, B.Sc and B.Ed exams?

Answer: Typically, theory exams are conducted from 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM or 2:00 PM to 5:00 PM (3 hours duration). Practical exams have separate timings. Check your specific date sheet for accurate timing information.
Q8. How many days gap between exams?
Answer: Usually, there's a 2-3 day gap between consecutive exams, giving students adequate preparation time. However, this can vary based on the number of subjects and administrative requirements.
Q9. Where can I check my exam center?
Answer: Your exam center details will be mentioned on your admit card, not on the date sheet. Download your admit card from the official website to know your exact examination center and seat number.
Q10. What to do if date sheet PDF is not opening?

Answer: Ensure you have Adobe Reader or any PDF reader installed. Try downloading again, clear browser cache, or use a different browser. If the problem persists, the server might be busy—try after some time or use alternative links provided.
